visual_enhancers.surfaces: Grid Borders and High-Contrast Tactical Minimalism. Use 1px solid strokes (border-border) instead of soft shadows.
visual_enhancers.effects: Subtle grain textures on empty states. Glow effects (blur-md) behind primary action buttons in Emerald.
visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: For sticky headers or floating elements: backdrop-blur-xl bg-black/60 with border-white/10.

layout.spacing: Generous Spacing: p-6 or p-8 for cards, gap-6 for grids. Use Tailwind scale.
layout.grid: MODE B: High Density Grid for Dashboards. grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4. Tight gaps (gap-4 or gap-6). h-full on children.
layout.sidebar: Left fixed sidebar (w-64) on desktop, hidden behind a hamburger on mobile. Nav items use 10 distinct categories.

components.sidebar: Pure HTML/Tailwind for layout. Active state: emerald green left border with bg-emerald-900/20.
components.exercise_cards: Shadcn Card. Flat rectangular. Image top (max-h-48 object-cover). Muscle tags (yellow/emerald badges). 1px border. No drop shadow.
components.anatomy_interactive: Custom SVG component with clickable paths for muscle groups. Active muscles fill with emerald green. Use generic human silhouette SVG.
components.program_builder: Drag and drop interface. Use @dnd-kit/core or similar. Provide visual drop zones.
components.tools: Shadcn Tabs component to switch between Rest Timer, Stopwatch, BMI, BMR, and 1RM Calculators.
components.search: Instant search bar in header with command palette style interface.

motion.hover: Explicit hover states (e.g. hover:bg-zinc-800 hover:text-white). Button hover: slight lift (-translate-y-1).
motion.transitions: transition-transform 0.2s ease, opacity 0.2s ease. NO transition-all.

accessibility.testing: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attribute in kebab-case (e.g., data-testid='start-workout-btn').

instructions_to_main_agent: Develop a 100% client-side Progressive Web App (PWA) using React (.js files) and Tailwind CSS without any backend.
Use LocalStorage or IndexedDB for all data persistence.

Implement a 10-item Left Sidebar for navigation: Accueil, Exercices, Exercices poids du corps, Exercices salle, Programmes prédéfinis, Créer un programme, Générateur intelligent, Favoris, Anatomie interactive, Paramètres.
Create an interactive anatomy SVG component (front and back) where clicking a muscle group filters the exercise library.
Build a drag-and-drop program builder allowing users to reorder exercises, sets, reps, and rest times.
Develop client-side calculators for BMI, calories, BMR, and 1RM, plus a rest timer and stopwatch.
Ensure dark mode is the default and only theme, using Emerald Green (#10b981) and Yellow (#facc15).
Apply the 'PERFORMANCE PRO' archetype: tactical minimalism, 1px solid borders, and deep obsidian backgrounds.
Do not use generic 'Inter' for headings. Use 'Poppins' for all headings and 'Inter' only for body text.

CRITICAL: DO NOT use complete transparent background in header, overlays, or any surface that has content under it (e.g., Dropdown with transparent background). Use solid backgrounds or glassmorphism (bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-xl).
Integrate Shadcn UI components where appropriate (Tabs, Dialogs, Inputs, Slider, Select, Accordion, Sonner), overriding their default styles to match the dark aesthetic and custom borders.
UNIVERSAL GUIDELINES FOR MAIN AGENT: Do not converge toward generic AI slop. Create distinctive, layered designs with z-index hierarchy.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Do not center align the app container. No '.App { text-align: center; }' in CSS.
Always use modern button styles (pill-shaped or sharp) with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style.
NEVER use AI assistant emoji characters for icons. Use lucide-react.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, entrance animations. Static = dead.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Do NOT apply universal transition (transition: all). This breaks transforms. Add transitions for specific properties.
All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute to facilitate robust automated testing.
Use 'sonner' for toast notifications (located in /app/frontend/src/components/ui/sonner.jsx if added).
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable.
Write components in .js/.jsx files as specified.
